case_title: SENTAGE CORP. VS. DR. ERIC BENSON

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $74.00) SERVED AUG-29-2017, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BENSON, DR. ERIC

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-02-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-02-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY RACHEL HAYES, OFFICE MANAGER. DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. BERTELSEN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
